title: Vegetarian German Stew
description: A hearty and comforting German-inspired stew made with robust vegetables and a variety of flavors.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the onion, carrots, and celery. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the vegetables are tender, about 10 minutes.
Add the red bell pepper and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
Stir in the tomato paste and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth, thyme, salt, and pepper. Bring the mixture to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20 minutes.
Add the potatoes and continue to simmer for an additional 15 minutes, or until the potatoes are tender.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh parsley if desired.
